prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DLT-2022STOCK-PARENT Product Type: HOME Brand (from catalog): Ruz Existing Title: Licensed Kids Stocking Stuffer Bundle Gift Set Dress Up Toys Boys Girls Ages 3 and up Description: Are you looking for the perfect stocking stuffer bundle gift set for your child? This officially licensed character-themed stocking bundle comes with a felt holiday stocking filled with matching toys.

Inside each character bundle set, you'll find an assortment of matching toys varying from dress-up, pretend play, action-adventure, stickers, stationery, and more. Please note that contents and styles may vary depending on your chosen character.

All of these accessories fit neatly inside a felt holiday stocking that can be easily affixed to just about any mantle with a sturdy hang loop. The soft felt stocking features an embossed snowflake pattern and measures 15.5" tall with a 9" wide boot. This is the perfect stocking stuffer gift bundle for your little one this holiday season.

Characters available: Paw Patrol, Minnie Mouse, Mickey Mouse, Baby Yoda, Avengers, Spiderman, Batman, or Frozen Search Terms: stocking stuffers for kids stocking stuffers for boys stocking stuffer ideas kids space toys pretend play licensed toys kids holiday stockings christmas gifts for kids gift sets for kids holiday gift sets for kids christmas stockings for kids Features: - ASSORTED TOYS - Each character-themed stocking stuffer bundle comes filled with an assortment of matching toys varying from dress-up, pretend play, action-adventure, stickers, stationery, and more (please note styles may vary) - ASSORTED TOYS - Each character-themed stocking stuffer bundle comes filled with an assortment of matching toys varying from dress-up, pretend play, action-adventure, stickers, stationery, and more (please note styles may vary) - SAFE FOR KIDS - All toys and accessories included in each stocking stuffer bundle are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision - DURABLE MATERIALS - Stockings and toys are made of durable, high-quality materials that will last for years to come; Great assortment of indoor and outdoor toys - FELT HOLIDAY STOCKING - Made of soft felt with embossed snowflake pattern, holiday stocking measures 15.5" with a 9" wide boot; Filled with toys, perfect for hanging on any mantle with a sturdy hang loop === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
